extraction.one_line_summary: VAN AERT won stage 5 after INEOS and JUMBO-VISMA orchestrated late crosswind attacks that disrupted sprint trains, outsprinting BOASEN HAGEN and BENNETT.
tactical_patterns: INEOS and JUMBO-VISMA coordinated crosswind splitting late race despite no GC threat, disrupting sprinters' positioning before finale.
SUNWEB committed full leadout for BOASEN HAGEN but VAN AERT sitting third wheel negated numerical advantage in final 800m.
Teams without sprinters showed unprecedented passivity at start facing headwind, suggesting wind direction dictates breakaway motivation more than opportunity.

rider_signals.VAN AERT Wout: positive: Worked for team in crosswinds day before then won sprint, showing recovery ability other pure sprinters lack
rider_signals.SAGAN Peter: negative: Trapped mid-pack at intermediate sprint and lacked positioning/power in finale, losing green jersey despite easier sprint profile
rider_signals.EWAN Caleb: negative: Normally wins from center pack but forced to front early, eased up before line suggesting positioning disruption cost him
rider_signals.BENNETT Sam: positive: Third place finish takes green jersey despite disrupted sprint trains from late crosswind attacks
rider_signals.TRENTIN Matteo: neutral: SCHAR attacked late to set up TRENTIN but tactic failed, CCC testing sprint setup variations
rider_signals.ROGLIC Primoz: neutral: BERNARD protecting him in crosswinds hints JUMBO priorities GC vigilance over pure sprint stages
